case_title: BOYKIN, MYRTLE I. vs. COSTA, LILA ROSA et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOYKIN, MYRTLE I. AS TO DEFENDANT COSTA, LILA ROSA COSTA, RICHARD A. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
